NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on 15th October 2023 by and between Dr. Tan Wei Ming, NRIC No. S8765432B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore, and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, NRIC No. S2345678C, of Tech Innovate Pte Ltd, UEN: T12LL3456A, with its principal office located at 456 Raffles Avenue, Singapore.

1. Confidentiality Obligations: Both parties agree to keep confidential any proprietary information disclosed under this Agreement. This includes, but is not limited to, trade secrets, client lists, and financial data. Any breach of confidentiality may result in legal action and damages amounting to SGD 50,000. All information shall only be used for purposes related to the collaboration outlined in this Agreement.

2. Duration and Termination: This Agreement shall commence on the date first above written and continue for a period of two years unless terminated earlier by mutual consent. Either party may terminate this Agreement by providing thirty (30) days written notice to the other party. Notices should be sent to Dr. Tan at tanweiming.sg@example.com and Ms. Siti at siti.aishah@techinnovate.sg. For any queries, please contact +65 6123 4567.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
